use tracing::{error, info};

fn process_request(req: &Request) -> Result<Response, Error> {
    let data = load_data(&req.id).map_err(|e| {
        error!(request_id = %req.id, error = %e, "failed to load data");
        Error::LoadFailed
    })?;
    let result = transform(&data).map_err(|e| {
        error!(request_id = %req.id, error = %e, "failed to transform");
        Error::TransformFailed
    })?;
    info!(request_id = %req.id, "request completed");
    Ok(Response { body: result })
}

fn load_data(_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, String> { todo!() }
fn transform(_data: &[u8]) -> Result<String, String> { todo!() }

struct Request { id: String }
struct Response { body: String }
enum Error { LoadFailed, TransformFailed }
